hero.headline: Plain scope. Fixed price. Dates we actually hit.

items.title: The core job
items.desc: Name your main service the way a customer asks for it on the phone, not the way your industry labels it. One sentence

items.title: The follow-on work
items.desc: The service customers add once the first job goes well. Explain why bundling it with the core job saves them a second

items.title: The odd request
items.desc: The job most competitors decline. Be precise about what qualifies, because the customer who needs this has already been

items.title: You describe it
items.desc: One call or one message. We ask the questions that change the price up front, so the quote is real.

items.title: We quote in writing
items.desc: A one-page quote with the scope, the price, and the date. It is valid for 30 days and it does not creep.

about.body: Your Business is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Consultation
features: Talk to us before you decide.

items.name: Support
features: We're here after the job too.

items.a: Call or message us with a few details — we reply the same day.
We serve the whole city and nearby areas.

items.q: Do you stand behind your work?
items.a: Yes — if something isn't right, we make it right.
